[textmode.js](../../../../../index.md) / [color](../../../index.md) / [TextmodeColor](../../TextmodeColor.md) / rgb

# Accessor: rgb

## Get Signature

```ts
get rgb(): [number, number, number];
```

Plain RGB tuple with integer components.

### Returns

\[`number`, `number`, `number`\]

A [r, g, b] tuple with values between 0 and 255.

### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="rgb" encoded-code="-IHsKCXQucmVzaXplQ2FudmFzKHdpbmRvdy5pbm5lcldpZHRoLCB3aW5kb3cuaW5uZXJIZWlnaHQpOwp9KTs" />
